## derived_valuation_size_full_v

Phase 3 valuation and size full view

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| pe | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pe | pe = stock_daily_basic.pe |
| pe_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pe_ttm | pe_ttm = stock_daily_basic.pe_ttm |
| pb | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pb | pb = stock_daily_basic.pb |
| ps | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ps | ps = stock_daily_basic.ps |
| ps_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ps_ttm | ps_ttm = stock_daily_basic.ps_ttm |
| dv_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | dv_ratio | dv_ratio = stock_daily_basic.dv_ratio |
| dv_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | dv_ttm | dv_ttm = stock_daily_basic.dv_ttm |
| total_share | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_share | total_share = stock_daily_basic.total_share |
| float_share | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | float_share | float_share = stock_daily_basic.float_share |
| free_share | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_share | free_share = stock_daily_basic.free_share |
| total_mv | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_mv | total_mv = stock_daily_basic.total_mv |
| circ_mv | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | circ_mv | circ_mv = stock_daily_basic.circ_mv |
| free_float_mv | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_float_mv | free_float_mv = close_raw * free_share; unit=10k CNY |
| log_total_mv | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | log_total_mv | log_total_mv = ln(total_mv) when total_mv > 0 |
| log_circ_mv | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | log_circ_mv | log_circ_mv = ln(circ_mv) when circ_mv > 0 |
| log_free_float_mv | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | log_free_float_mv | log_free_float_mv = ln(free_float_mv) when free_float_mv > 0 |
| float_share_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | float_share_ratio | float_share_ratio = float_share / total_share |
| free_share_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_share_ratio | free_share_ratio = free_share / total_share |
| earnings_yield_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | earnings_yield_ttm | earnings_yield_ttm = 1 / pe_ttm when pe_ttm > 0 |
| book_to_price | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | book_to_price | book_to_price = 1 / pb when pb > 0 |
| sales_yield_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | sales_yield_ttm | sales_yield_ttm = 1 / ps_ttm when ps_ttm > 0 |
| dividend_yield_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | dividend_yield_ttm | dividend_yield_ttm = dv_ttm / 100 |
| pe_ttm_pct_5y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pe_ttm_pct_5y | pe_ttm_pct_5y = rolling_percentile_rank(pe_ttm,1250) |
| pb_pct_5y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pb_pct_5y | pb_pct_5y = rolling_percentile_rank(pb,1250) |
| ps_ttm_pct_5y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ps_ttm_pct_5y | ps_ttm_pct_5y = rolling_percentile_rank(ps_ttm,1250) |
| total_mv_pct_5y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_mv_pct_5y | total_mv_pct_5y = rolling_percentile_rank(total_mv,1250) |
| pe_ttm_valid_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | pe_ttm_valid_flag | pe_ttm_valid_flag = pe_ttm > 0 |
| pb_valid_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | pb_valid_flag | pb_valid_flag = pb > 0 |
| ps_ttm_valid_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | ps_ttm_valid_flag | ps_ttm_valid_flag = ps_ttm > 0 |
| mv_valid_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | mv_valid_flag | mv_valid_flag = total_mv > 0 and circ_mv > 0 |
| valuation_missing_reason | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | valuation_missing_reason | 估值缺失原因：missing_daily_basic/missing_price/invalid_valuation/null |
| earnings_yield | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | earnings_yield | earnings_yield = 1 / pe when pe > 0 |
| sales_yield | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | sales_yield | sales_yield = 1 / ps when ps > 0 |
| dividend_yield | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | dividend_yield | dividend_yield = dv_ratio / 100 |
| log_pe_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | log_pe_ttm | log_pe_ttm = ln(pe_ttm) when pe_ttm > 0 |
| log_pb | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | log_pb | log_pb = ln(pb) when pb > 0 |
| log_ps_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | log_ps_ttm | log_ps_ttm = ln(ps_ttm) when ps_ttm > 0 |
| dv_valid_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | dv_valid_flag | dv_valid_flag = dv_ratio is not null or dv_ttm is not null |

| total_mv_ma_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_mv_ma_120 | total_mv_ma_120 = avg(total_mv,120) |
| total_mv_ma_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_mv_ma_250 | total_mv_ma_250 = avg(total_mv,250) |
| circ_mv_ma_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | circ_mv_ma_20 | circ_mv_ma_20 = avg(circ_mv,20) |
| circ_mv_ma_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | circ_mv_ma_60 | circ_mv_ma_60 = avg(circ_mv,60) |
| circ_mv_ma_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | circ_mv_ma_120 | circ_mv_ma_120 = avg(circ_mv,120) |

| float_to_total_share_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | float_to_total_share_ratio | float_to_total_share_ratio = float_share / total_share |
| free_to_total_share_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_to_total_share_ratio | free_to_total_share_ratio = free_share / total_share |
| free_to_float_share_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_to_float_share_ratio | free_to_float_share_ratio = free_share / float_share |
| circ_mv_to_total_mv_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | circ_mv_to_total_mv_ratio | circ_mv_to_total_mv_ratio = circ_mv / total_mv |
| free_float_mv_to_total_mv_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_float_mv_to_total_mv_ratio | free_float_mv_to_total_mv_ratio = free_float_mv / total_mv |
| amount_to_total_mv | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | amount_to_total_mv | amount_to_total_mv = (derived_daily_spine.amount / 10) / total_mv |
| amount_to_circ_mv | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | amount_to_circ_mv | amount_to_circ_mv = (derived_daily_spine.amount / 10) / circ_mv |
| peg_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | peg_ttm | peg_ttm = pe_ttm / parent_net_profit_yoy_1y_calc_asof when growth > 0 |
| pb_to_roe | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pb_to_roe | pb_to_roe = pb / roe_asof when pb > 0 and roe_asof > 0 |
| pe_to_roe | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pe_to_roe | pe_to_roe = pe_ttm / roe_asof when pe_ttm > 0 and roe_asof > 0 |
| price_to_bps_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | price_to_bps_asof | price_to_bps_asof = close_raw / bps_asof when bps_asof > 0 |
| price_to_eps_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | price_to_eps_asof | price_to_eps_asof = close_raw / eps_asof when eps_asof > 0 |
| price_to_ocfps_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | price_to_ocfps_asof | price_to_ocfps_asof = close_raw / ocfps_asof when ocfps_asof > 0 |
| market_cap_to_parent_profit | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | market_cap_to_parent_profit | market_cap_to_parent_profit = total_mv * 10000 / parent_net_profit_single_quarter_value_asof |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | no | local_derived | updated_at | 本地更新时间 |

## derived_northbound_flow_cache

Phase 3 北向资金市场背景与持仓变化缓存表

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| north_money | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money | 市场级北向资金净流入 = northbound_daily.north_money |
| hgt | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | hgt | 市场级沪股通资金流 = northbound_daily.hgt |
| sgt | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | sgt | 市场级深股通资金流 = northbound_daily.sgt |
| ggt_ss | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ggt_ss | 市场级港股通沪资金流 = northbound_daily.ggt_ss |
| ggt_sz | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ggt_sz | 市场级港股通深资金流 = northbound_daily.ggt_sz |
| south_money | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | south_money | 市场级南向资金净流入 = northbound_daily.south_money |
| north_money_ma_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_ma_2 | 2日市场级北向净流入均值 = avg(north_money,2) |
| north_money_ma_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_ma_3 | 3日市场级北向净流入均值 = avg(north_money,3) |
| north_money_ma_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_ma_5 | 5日市场级北向净流入均值 = avg(north_money,5) |
| north_money_ma_10 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_ma_10 | 10日市场级北向净流入均值 = avg(north_money,10) |
| north_money_ma_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_ma_20 | 20日市场级北向净流入均值 = avg(north_money,20) |
| north_money_ma_30 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_ma_30 | 30日市场级北向净流入均值 = avg(north_money,30) |
| north_money_ma_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_ma_60 | 60日市场级北向净流入均值 = avg(north_money,60) |
| north_money_ma_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_ma_120 | 120日市场级北向净流入均值 = avg(north_money,120) |
| north_money_ma_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_ma_250 | 250日市场级北向净流入均值 = avg(north_money,250) |
| north_money_sum_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_sum_2 | 2日市场级北向净流入累计 = sum(north_money,2) |
| north_money_sum_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_sum_3 | 3日市场级北向净流入累计 = sum(north_money,3) |
| north_money_sum_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_sum_5 | 5日市场级北向净流入累计 = sum(north_money,5) |
| north_money_sum_10 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_sum_10 | 10日市场级北向净流入累计 = sum(north_money,10) |
| north_money_sum_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_sum_20 | 20日市场级北向净流入累计 = sum(north_money,20) |
| north_money_sum_30 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_sum_30 | 30日市场级北向净流入累计 = sum(north_money,30) |
| north_money_sum_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_sum_60 | 60日市场级北向净流入累计 = sum(north_money,60) |
| north_money_sum_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_sum_120 | 120日市场级北向净流入累计 = sum(north_money,120) |
| north_money_sum_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_sum_250 | 250日市场级北向净流入累计 = sum(north_money,250) |
| north_money_zscore_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_zscore_20 | 20日市场级北向净流入Z值 = (north_money - avg(north_money,20)) / stddev(north_money,20) |
| north_money_zscore_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_zscore_60 | 60日市场级北向净流入Z值 = (north_money - avg(north_money,60)) / stddev(north_money,60) |
| north_money_zscore_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_zscore_120 | 120日市场级北向净流入Z值 = (north_money - avg(north_money,120)) / stddev(north_money,120) |
| north_money_zscore_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_money_zscore_250 | 250日市场级北向净流入Z值 = (north_money - avg(north_money,250)) / stddev(north_money,250) |
| north_hold_shares_chg_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_shares_chg_5 | 5日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,5) - 1 |
| north_hold_shares_chg_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_shares_chg_20 | 20日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,20) - 1 |
| north_hold_shares_chg_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_shares_chg_60 | 60日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,60) - 1 |
| north_hold_shares_chg_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_shares_chg_120 | 120日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,120) - 1 |
| north_hold_shares_chg_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_shares_chg_250 | 250日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,250) - 1 |
| north_hold_ratio_chg_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_ratio_chg_5 | 5日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,5) |
| north_hold_ratio_chg_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_ratio_chg_20 | 20日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,20) |
| north_hold_ratio_chg_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_ratio_chg_60 | 60日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,60) |
| north_hold_ratio_chg_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_ratio_chg_120 | 120日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,120) |
| north_hold_ratio_chg_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_ratio_chg_250 | 250日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,250) |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | no | local_derived | updated_at | 本地更新时间 |

| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| top_list_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | top_list_flag | 是否龙虎榜上榜 = top_list_daily 当日有记录 |
| top_list_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_list_net_amount | 龙虎榜净买入额 = top_list_daily.net_amount |
| top_list_net_rate | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_list_net_rate | 龙虎榜净买入率 = top_list_daily.net_rate |
| top_list_amount_rate | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_list_amount_rate | 龙虎榜成交额占比 = top_list_daily.amount_rate |
| top_list_reason | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | top_list_reason | 龙虎榜上榜原因 = top_list_daily.reason |
| top_inst_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | top_inst_flag | 是否有机构席位记录 = top_inst_detail 当日有记录 |
| top_inst_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_buy_amount | 机构席位买入额 = sum(top_inst_detail.buy) |
| top_inst_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_sell_amount | 机构席位卖出额 = sum(top_inst_detail.sell) |
| top_inst_net_buy | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_net_buy | 机构席位净买入额 = sum(top_inst_detail.net_buy) |
| top_inst_buy_sell_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_buy_sell_ratio | 机构席位买卖比 = top_inst_buy_amount / top_inst_sell_amount |
| top_inst_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top_inst_count | 机构席位记录数 = count(top_inst_detail) |
| top_list_days_2 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top_list_days_2 | 2日龙虎榜上榜天数 = sum(top_list_flag,2) |
| top_list_days_3 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top_list_days_3 | 3日龙虎榜上榜天数 = sum(top_list_flag,3) |
| top_list_days_5 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top_list_days_5 | 5日龙虎榜上榜天数 = sum(top_list_flag,5) |

| top_list_days_20 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top_list_days_20 | 20日龙虎榜上榜天数 = sum(top_list_flag,20) |

| top_list_days_120 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top_list_days_120 | 120日龙虎榜上榜天数 = sum(top_list_flag,120) |
| top_list_days_250 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top_list_days_250 | 250日龙虎榜上榜天数 = sum(top_list_flag,250) |
| top_inst_net_buy_sum_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_net_buy_sum_2 | 2日机构席位净买入累计 = sum(top_inst_net_buy,2) |
| top_inst_net_buy_sum_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_net_buy_sum_3 | 3日机构席位净买入累计 = sum(top_inst_net_buy,3) |
| top_inst_net_buy_sum_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_net_buy_sum_5 | 5日机构席位净买入累计 = sum(top_inst_net_buy,5) |
| top_inst_net_buy_sum_10 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_net_buy_sum_10 | 10日机构席位净买入累计 = sum(top_inst_net_buy,10) |

## derived_capital_flow_full_v

Phase 3 资金流与交易行为完整视图

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| small_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | small_buy_amount | 小单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_sm_amount，单位万元 |
| small_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | small_sell_amount | 小单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_sm_amount，单位万元 |
| small_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | small_net_amount | 小单净流入额 = buy_sm_amount - sell_sm_amount，单位万元 |
| medium_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | medium_buy_amount | 中单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_md_amount，单位万元 |
| medium_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | medium_sell_amount | 中单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_md_amount，单位万元 |
| medium_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | medium_net_amount | 中单净流入额 = buy_md_amount - sell_md_amount，单位万元 |
| large_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | large_buy_amount | 大单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_lg_amount，单位万元 |
| large_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | large_sell_amount | 大单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_lg_amount，单位万元 |
| large_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | large_net_amount | 大单净流入额 = buy_lg_amount - sell_lg_amount，单位万元 |
| extra_large_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | extra_large_buy_amount | 超大单买入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.buy_elg_amount，单位万元 |
| extra_large_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | extra_large_sell_amount | 超大单卖出额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.sell_elg_amount，单位万元 |
| extra_large_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | extra_large_net_amount | 超大单净流入额 = buy_elg_amount - sell_elg_amount，单位万元 |
| main_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_net_amount | 主力净流入额 = large_net_amount + extra_large_net_amount，单位万元 |
| main_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_buy_amount | 主力买入额 = large_buy_amount + extra_large_buy_amount，单位万元 |
| main_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_sell_amount | 主力卖出额 = large_sell_amount + extra_large_sell_amount，单位万元 |
| retail_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | retail_net_amount | 散户净流入额 = small_net_amount，单位万元 |
| net_mf_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | net_mf_amount | 总净流入额 = stock_moneyflow_daily.net_mf_amount，单位万元 |
| net_mf_vol | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | net_mf_vol | 总净流入量 = stock_moneyflow_daily.net_mf_vol |
| main_net_amount_rate | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_net_amount_rate | 主力净流入占成交额 = main_net_amount * 10 / derived_daily_spine.amount |
| large_net_amount_rate | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | large_net_amount_rate | 大单净流入占成交额 = large_net_amount * 10 / derived_daily_spine.amount |
| extra_large_net_amount_rate | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | extra_large_net_amount_rate | 超大单净流入占成交额 = extra_large_net_amount * 10 / derived_daily_spine.amount |
| small_net_amount_rate | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | small_net_amount_rate | 小单净流入占成交额 = small_net_amount * 10 / derived_daily_spine.amount |
| main_flow_ma_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_ma_5 | 5日主力净流入均值 = avg(main_net_amount,5)，单位万元 |
| main_flow_ma_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_ma_20 | 20日主力净流入均值 = avg(main_net_amount,20)，单位万元 |
| main_flow_ma_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_ma_60 | 60日主力净流入均值 = avg(main_net_amount,60)，单位万元 |
| main_flow_ma_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_ma_120 | 120日主力净流入均值 = avg(main_net_amount,120)，单位万元 |
| main_flow_sum_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_sum_5 | 5日主力净流入累计 = sum(main_net_amount,5)，单位万元 |
| main_flow_sum_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_sum_20 | 20日主力净流入累计 = sum(main_net_amount,20)，单位万元 |
| main_flow_sum_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_sum_60 | 60日主力净流入累计 = sum(main_net_amount,60)，单位万元 |
| main_flow_sum_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_sum_120 | 120日主力净流入累计 = sum(main_net_amount,120)，单位万元 |
| main_flow_positive_days_20 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | main_flow_positive_days_20 | 20日主力净流入为正天数 = sum(main_net_amount > 0,20) |
| main_flow_persist_ratio_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_persist_ratio_20 | 20日主力净流入持续比例 = main_flow_positive_days_20 / 20 |
| main_flow_to_total_mv_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_to_total_mv_20 | 20日主力净流入占总市值 = main_flow_sum_20 / derived_valuation_size.total_mv |
| main_flow_to_circ_mv_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | main_flow_to_circ_mv_20 | 20日主力净流入占流通市值 = main_flow_sum_20 / derived_valuation_size.circ_mv |
| margin_balance | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | margin_balance | 融资余额 = margin_detail.margin_balance，单位元 |
| short_balance | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | short_balance | 融券余额 = margin_detail.short_balance，单位元 |
| margin_buy | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | margin_buy | 融资买入额 = margin_detail.margin_buy，单位元 |
| margin_repay | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | margin_repay | 融资偿还额 = margin_detail.margin_repay，单位元 |
| short_sell_volume | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | short_sell_volume | 融券卖出量 = margin_detail.short_sell_volume |
| short_repay_volume | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | short_repay_volume | 融券偿还量 = margin_detail.short_repay_volume |
| total_margin_short_balance | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_margin_short_balance | 两融总余额 = margin_detail.total_balance，单位元 |
| margin_balance_chg_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | margin_balance_chg_5 | 5日融资余额变化率 = margin_balance / lag(margin_balance,5) - 1 |
| margin_balance_chg_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | margin_balance_chg_20 | 20日融资余额变化率 = margin_balance / lag(margin_balance,20) - 1 |
| margin_balance_chg_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | margin_balance_chg_60 | 60日融资余额变化率 = margin_balance / lag(margin_balance,60) - 1 |
| margin_balance_chg_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | margin_balance_chg_120 | 120日融资余额变化率 = margin_balance / lag(margin_balance,120) - 1 |
| margin_buy_to_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | margin_buy_to_amount | 融资买入占成交额 = margin_buy / (derived_daily_spine.amount * 1000) |
| margin_short_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | margin_short_ratio | 融券余额/融资余额 = short_balance / margin_balance |
| north_hold_shares | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_shares | 北向持股数量 = northbound_holding.hold_shares |
| north_hold_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_ratio | 北向持股比例 = northbound_holding.hold_ratio |
| north_hold_shares_chg_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_shares_chg_5 | 5日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,5) - 1 |
| north_hold_shares_chg_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_shares_chg_20 | 20日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,20) - 1 |
| north_hold_shares_chg_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_shares_chg_60 | 60日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,60) - 1 |
| north_hold_shares_chg_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_shares_chg_120 | 120日北向持股数量变化率 = north_hold_shares / lag(north_hold_shares,120) - 1 |
| north_hold_ratio_chg_5 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_ratio_chg_5 | 5日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,5) |
| north_hold_ratio_chg_20 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_ratio_chg_20 | 20日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,20) |
| north_hold_ratio_chg_60 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_ratio_chg_60 | 60日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,60) |
| north_hold_ratio_chg_120 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | north_hold_ratio_chg_120 | 120日北向持股比例变化 = north_hold_ratio - lag(north_hold_ratio,120) |
| has_moneyflow | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_moneyflow | 是否有个股资金流数据 = stock_moneyflow_daily 是否匹配 |
| has_margin | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_margin | 是否有两融数据 = margin_detail 是否匹配 |

| top_list_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | top_list_flag | 是否龙虎榜上榜 = top_list_daily 当日有记录 |
| top_list_net_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_list_net_amount | 龙虎榜净买入额 = top_list_daily.net_amount |
| top_list_net_rate | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_list_net_rate | 龙虎榜净买入率 = top_list_daily.net_rate |

| top_list_reason | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | top_list_reason | 龙虎榜上榜原因 = top_list_daily.reason |
| top_inst_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | top_inst_flag | 是否有机构席位记录 = top_inst_detail 当日有记录 |
| top_inst_buy_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_buy_amount | 机构席位买入额 = sum(top_inst_detail.buy) |
| top_inst_sell_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_sell_amount | 机构席位卖出额 = sum(top_inst_detail.sell) |

| top_inst_buy_sell_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top_inst_buy_sell_ratio | 机构席位买卖比 = top_inst_buy_amount / top_inst_sell_amount |
| top_inst_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top_inst_count | 机构席位记录数 = count(top_inst_detail) |

Phase 3 行业日频上下文缓存

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `industry_level, industry_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| industry_level | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | industry_level | 行业层级：L1/L2 |
| industry_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | industry_code | 行业代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| industry_name | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | industry_name | 行业名称 |
| industry_stock_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | industry_stock_count | 行业股票数量 |
| industry_total_mv | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | industry_total_mv | 行业总市值 = sum(total_mv) |
| industry_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | industry_ret_2 | 2日行业等权收益 = avg(ret_2_hfq) |
| industry_ret_rank_all_2 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | industry_ret_rank_all_2 | 2日行业收益全行业排名 = rank(industry_ret_2) |
| industry_ret_pct_all_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | industry_ret_pct_all_2 | 2日行业收益全行业分位 = percent_rank(industry_ret_2) |
| industry_amount_ma_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | industry_amount_ma_2 | 2日行业成交额均值 = avg(sum(amount),2) |
| industry_amount_pct_all_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | industry_amount_pct_all_2 | 2日行业成交额全行业分位 = percent_rank(industry_amount_ma_2) |
| industry_turnover_ma_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | industry_turnover_ma_2 | 2日行业换手均值 = avg(turnover_rate_ma_20,2) |

## derived_concept_daily_cache

Phase 3 概念日频上下文缓存

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `concept_id, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| concept_id | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | concept_id | 概念ID |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| concept_name | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_name | 概念名称 |
| concept_stock_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_stock_count | 概念成分股票数量 |
| concept_member_share | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_member_share | 概念成分数占全市场比例 = concept_stock_count / market_stock_count |
| concept_broad_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | concept_broad_flag | 是否宽泛概念 = concept_member_share > 0.10 |
| concept_narrow_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | concept_narrow_flag | 是否窄口径概念 = concept_stock_count >= 5 AND concept_member_share <= 0.10 |
| concept_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_ret_2 | 2日概念等权收益 = avg(ret_2_hfq) |
| concept_ret_rank_all_2 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_ret_rank_all_2 | 2日概念收益全概念排名 = rank(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_ret_pct_all_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_ret_pct_all_2 | 2日概念收益全概念分位 = percent_rank(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_amount_ma_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_amount_ma_2 | 2日概念成交额均值 = avg(sum(amount),2) |
| concept_amount_pct_all_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_amount_pct_all_2 | 2日概念成交额全概念分位 = percent_rank(concept_amount_ma_2) |
| concept_up_ratio_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_up_ratio_2 | 2日概念涨停占比均值 = avg(limit_up_count / concept_stock_count,2) |
| concept_limit_up_count_2 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_limit_up_count_2 | 2日概念涨停数量累计 = sum(limit_up_count,2) |
| concept_main_flow_sum_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_main_flow_sum_2 | 2日概念主力净流入累计 = sum(main_net_amount,2) |
| concept_hot_flag_2 | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | concept_hot_flag_2 | 2日概念是否高热 = concept_ret_pct_all_2 >= 0.8 OR concept_amount_pct_all_2 >= 0.8 |
| concept_ret_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_ret_3 | 3日概念等权收益 = avg(ret_3_hfq) |
| concept_ret_rank_all_3 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_ret_rank_all_3 | 3日概念收益全概念排名 = rank(concept_ret_3) |
| concept_ret_pct_all_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_ret_pct_all_3 | 3日概念收益全概念分位 = percent_rank(concept_ret_3) |
| concept_amount_ma_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_amount_ma_3 | 3日概念成交额均值 = avg(sum(amount),3) |
| concept_amount_pct_all_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_amount_pct_all_3 | 3日概念成交额全概念分位 = percent_rank(concept_amount_ma_3) |
| concept_up_ratio_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_up_ratio_3 | 3日概念涨停占比均值 = avg(limit_up_count / concept_stock_count,3) |
| concept_limit_up_count_3 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_limit_up_count_3 | 3日概念涨停数量累计 = sum(limit_up_count,3) |
| concept_main_flow_sum_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_main_flow_sum_3 | 3日概念主力净流入累计 = sum(main_net_amount,3) |

## derived_sector_concept_context_full_v

Phase 3 行业概念上下文完整视图

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | yes | local_derived | updated_at | 本地更新时间 |
| sw_l1_code | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | sw_l1_code | 申万一级行业代码 |
| sw_l1_name | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | sw_l1_name | 申万一级行业名称 |
| sw_l2_code | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | sw_l2_code | 申万二级行业代码 |
| sw_l2_name | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | sw_l2_name | 申万二级行业名称 |
| has_sw_industry | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_sw_industry | 是否有申万行业归属 |
| industry_member_days | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | industry_member_days | 行业归属持续天数 = trade_date - in_date |
| industry_member_is_current | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | industry_member_is_current | 是否当前行业成员 |

| concept_worst_id_250 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_worst_id_250 | 250日领跌概念ID = arg_min(concept_id, concept_ret_250) |
| concept_worst_name_250 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_worst_name_250 | 250日领跌概念名称 = arg_min(concept_name, concept_ret_250) |
| concept_worst_ret_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_worst_ret_250 | 250日领跌概念收益 = min(concept_ret_250) |
| concept_avg_ret_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_avg_ret_250 | 所属概念250日平均收益 = avg(concept_ret_250) |
| concept_median_ret_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_median_ret_250 | 所属概念250日中位收益 = median(concept_ret_250) |
| concept_max_ret_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_max_ret_250 | 所属概念250日最大收益 = max(concept_ret_250) |
| concept_min_ret_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_min_ret_250 | 所属概念250日最小收益 = min(concept_ret_250) |
| concept_ret_spread_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_ret_spread_250 | 所属概念250日收益跨度 = max(concept_ret_250) - min(concept_ret_250) |
| concept_positive_count_250 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_positive_count_250 | 250日正收益概念数量 = count(concept_ret_250 > 0) |
| concept_negative_count_250 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_negative_count_250 | 250日负收益概念数量 = count(concept_ret_250 < 0) |
| concept_avg_amount_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_avg_amount_250 | 所属概念250日平均成交额 = avg(concept_amount_ma_250) |
| concept_main_flow_sum_250 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_main_flow_sum_250 | 所属概念250日主力净流入均值 = avg(concept_main_flow_sum_250) |
| concept_hot_count_250 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_hot_count_250 | 250日高热概念数量 = count(concept_hot_flag_250) |

## derived_concept_stock_context_cache

Phase 3 个股概念多周期列表缓存

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| concept_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_count | 所属概念数量 = count_distinct(concept_member.concept_id) |
| concept_ids_all | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_ids_all | 全部所属概念ID列表 = string_agg(concept_member.concept_id,';') |
| concept_names_all | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_names_all | 全部所属概念名称列表 = string_agg(concept_member.concept_name,';') |
| concept_broad_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_broad_count | 宽泛概念数量 = sum(derived_concept_daily_cache.concept_broad_flag) |
| concept_narrow_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_narrow_count | 窄口径概念数量 = sum(derived_concept_daily_cache.concept_narrow_flag) |
| concept_ids_top_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_ids_top_2 | 2日领涨概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_member.concept_id, derived_concept_daily_cache.concept_ret_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_names_top_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_names_top_2 | 2日领涨概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_name, concept_ret_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_lagging_ids_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_lagging_ids_2 | 2日领跌概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_min(concept_member.concept_id, concept_ret_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_lagging_names_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_lagging_names_2 | 2日领跌概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_min(concept_name, concept_ret_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_active_ids_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_active_ids_2 | 2日活跃概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_member.concept_id, concept_amount_pct_all_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_active_names_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_active_names_2 | 2日活跃概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_name, concept_amount_pct_all_2, 5), ';') |
| concept_narrow_leading_ids_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_narrow_leading_ids_2 | 2日窄口径领涨概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_id, CASE WHEN concept_narrow_flag THEN concept_ret_2 END, 5), ';') |
| concept_narrow_leading_names_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_narrow_leading_names_2 | 2日窄口径领涨概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_name, CASE WHEN concept_narrow_flag THEN concept_ret_2 END, 5), ';') |
| concept_best_id_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_best_id_2 | 2日领涨概念ID = arg_max(concept_id, concept_ret_2) |
| concept_best_name_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_best_name_2 | 2日领涨概念名称 = arg_max(concept_name, concept_ret_2) |
| concept_best_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_best_ret_2 | 2日领涨概念收益 = max(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_worst_id_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_worst_id_2 | 2日领跌概念ID = arg_min(concept_id, concept_ret_2) |
| concept_worst_name_2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_worst_name_2 | 2日领跌概念名称 = arg_min(concept_name, concept_ret_2) |
| concept_worst_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_worst_ret_2 | 2日领跌概念收益 = min(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_avg_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_avg_ret_2 | 所属概念2日平均收益 = avg(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_median_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_median_ret_2 | 所属概念2日中位收益 = median(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_max_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_max_ret_2 | 所属概念2日最大收益 = max(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_min_ret_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_min_ret_2 | 所属概念2日最小收益 = min(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_ret_spread_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_ret_spread_2 | 所属概念2日收益跨度 = max(concept_ret_2) - min(concept_ret_2) |
| concept_positive_count_2 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_positive_count_2 | 2日正收益概念数量 = count(concept_ret_2 > 0) |
| concept_negative_count_2 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_negative_count_2 | 2日负收益概念数量 = count(concept_ret_2 < 0) |
| concept_avg_amount_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_avg_amount_2 | 所属概念2日平均成交额 = avg(concept_amount_ma_2) |
| concept_main_flow_sum_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_main_flow_sum_2 | 所属概念2日主力净流入均值 = avg(concept_main_flow_sum_2) |
| concept_hot_count_2 | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | concept_hot_count_2 | 2日高热概念数量 = count(concept_hot_flag_2) |
| concept_ids_top_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_ids_top_3 | 3日领涨概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_member.concept_id, derived_concept_daily_cache.concept_ret_3, 5), ';') |
| concept_names_top_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_names_top_3 | 3日领涨概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_name, concept_ret_3, 5), ';') |
| concept_lagging_ids_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_lagging_ids_3 | 3日领跌概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_min(concept_member.concept_id, concept_ret_3, 5), ';') |
| concept_lagging_names_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_lagging_names_3 | 3日领跌概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_min(concept_name, concept_ret_3, 5), ';') |
| concept_active_ids_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_active_ids_3 | 3日活跃概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_member.concept_id, concept_amount_pct_all_3, 5), ';') |
| concept_active_names_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_active_names_3 | 3日活跃概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_name, concept_amount_pct_all_3, 5), ';') |
| concept_narrow_leading_ids_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_narrow_leading_ids_3 | 3日窄口径领涨概念ID列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_id, CASE WHEN concept_narrow_flag THEN concept_ret_3 END, 5), ';') |
| concept_narrow_leading_names_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_narrow_leading_names_3 | 3日窄口径领涨概念名称列表 = array_to_string(arg_max(concept_name, CASE WHEN concept_narrow_flag THEN concept_ret_3 END, 5), ';') |
| concept_best_id_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_best_id_3 | 3日领涨概念ID = arg_max(concept_id, concept_ret_3) |
| concept_best_name_3 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_best_name_3 | 3日领涨概念名称 = arg_max(concept_name, concept_ret_3) |
| concept_best_ret_3 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | concept_best_ret_3 | 3日领涨概念收益 = max(concept_ret_3) |

## derived_cross_sectional_full_v

Phase 3 截面变换完整视图

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| xs_universe_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | xs_universe_flag | 是否进入截面样本 = is_listed_asof AND has_price AND price_valid_flag |
| xs_market | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | xs_market | 截面市场分组 = derived_daily_spine.market |
| xs_exchange | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | xs_exchange | 截面交易所分组 = derived_daily_spine.exchange |
| xs_sw_l1_code | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | xs_sw_l1_code | 截面申万一级行业 = derived_sector_concept_context.sw_l1_code |
| xs_sw_l2_code | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | xs_sw_l2_code | 截面申万二级行业 = derived_sector_concept_context.sw_l2_code |
| xs_sample_all_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | xs_sample_all_count | 全市场截面样本数 = count(valid universe) over trade_date |
| xs_sample_market_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | xs_sample_market_count | 市场分组样本数 = count(valid universe) over trade_date, market |
| xs_sample_sw_l1_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | xs_sample_sw_l1_count | 申万一级样本数 = count(valid universe) over trade_date, sw_l1_code |
| xs_sample_sw_l2_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | xs_sample_sw_l2_count | 申万二级样本数 = count(valid universe) over trade_date, sw_l2_code |
| xs_core_available_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | xs_core_available_count | 核心截面变量可用数 = count(non_null_core_values) |
| xs_core_available_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | xs_core_available_ratio | 核心截面变量可用率 = xs_core_available_count / 45 |
| xs_missing_fields | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | xs_missing_fields | 缺失核心字段列表 = string_join(missing field names,';') |
| xs_winsor_lower_pct | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | xs_winsor_lower_pct | 缩尾下分位 = 0.01 |
| xs_winsor_upper_pct | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | xs_winsor_upper_pct | 缩尾上分位 = 0.99 |
| xs_min_group_zscore_n | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | xs_min_group_zscore_n | z-score最小分组样本数 = 20 |
| xs_min_group_rank_n | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | xs_min_group_rank_n | 排名最小分组样本数 = 5 |
| ret_20_hfq_rank_all_desc | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | ret_20_hfq_rank_all_desc | 20日收益全市场降序排名 = rank(基于原始来源 derived_return_momentum.ret_20_hfq，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%) DESC) over partition by trade_date; 样本数 < 5 时返回NULL |
| ret_20_hfq_pct_all_desc | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_20_hfq_pct_all_desc | 20日收益全市场降序分位 = (n-rank(基于原始来源 derived_return_momentum.ret_20_hfq，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%) DESC))/(n-1) over partition by trade_date; 样本数 < 5 时返回NULL |
| ret_20_hfq_z_all | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_20_hfq_z_all | 20日收益全市场z值 = z(基于原始来源 derived_return_momentum.ret_20_hfq，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%)) over partition by trade_date; 样本数 < 20 或标准差为0时返回NULL |
| ret_20_hfq_rank_market_desc | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | ret_20_hfq_rank_market_desc | 20日收益市场降序排名 = rank(基于原始来源 derived_return_momentum.ret_20_hfq，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%) DESC) over partition by trade_date,xs_market; 样本数 < 5 时返回NULL |
| ret_20_hfq_pct_market_desc | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_20_hfq_pct_market_desc | 20日收益市场降序分位 = (n-rank(基于原始来源 derived_return_momentum.ret_20_hfq，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%) DESC))/(n-1) over partition by trade_date,xs_market; 样本数 < 5 时返回NULL |
| ret_20_hfq_rank_sw_l2_desc | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | ret_20_hfq_rank_sw_l2_desc | 20日收益申万二级降序排名 = rank(基于原始来源 derived_return_momentum.ret_20_hfq，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%) DESC) over partition by trade_date,xs_sw_l2_code; 样本数 < 5 时返回NULL |
| ret_20_hfq_pct_sw_l2_desc | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ret_20_hfq_pct_sw_l2_desc | 20日收益申万二级降序分位 = (n-rank(基于原始来源 derived_return_momentum.ret_20_hfq，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%) DESC))/(n-1) over partition by trade_date,xs_sw_l2_code; 样本数 < 5 时返回NULL |

| stock_excess_zz1000_20_rank_all_desc | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | stock_excess_zz1000_20_rank_all_desc | 20日相对中证1000超额收益全市场降序排名 = rank(基于原始来源 derived_index_market_context.stock_excess_zz1000_20，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%) DESC) over partition by trade_date; 样本数 < 5 时返回NULL |
| stock_excess_zz1000_20_pct_all_desc | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | stock_excess_zz1000_20_pct_all_desc | 20日相对中证1000超额收益全市场降序分位 = (n-rank(基于原始来源 derived_index_market_context.stock_excess_zz1000_20，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%) DESC))/(n-1) over partition by trade_date; 样本数 < 5 时返回NULL |
| stock_excess_zz1000_20_z_all | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | stock_excess_zz1000_20_z_all | 20日相对中证1000超额收益全市场z值 = z(基于原始来源 derived_index_market_context.stock_excess_zz1000_20，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%)) over partition by trade_date; 样本数 < 20 或标准差为0时返回NULL |
| stock_excess_zz1000_20_rank_market_desc | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | stock_excess_zz1000_20_rank_market_desc | 20日相对中证1000超额收益市场降序排名 = rank(基于原始来源 derived_index_market_context.stock_excess_zz1000_20，先按 xs_universe_flag=true 且 source 非空、非特殊值，并按变量 valid_rule 过滤正值/非负值 取样并做 winsor(source,1%,99%) DESC) over partition by trade_date,xs_market; 样本数 < 5 时返回NULL |

## derived_corporate_action_full_v

Phase 3 corporate action full view

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| corp_action_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | corp_action_available_flag | 公司行为数据可用标记 = 任一核心事件asof字段非空 |
| latest_corp_action_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_corp_action_date | 最近公司行为事件日期 = max(event_date <= trade_date) |
| days_since_latest_corp_action | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_latest_corp_action | 距最近公司行为事件天数 = trade_date - latest_corp_action_date |
| corp_action_event_count_365d | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | corp_action_event_count_365d | 近一年公司行为事件数 = count(event_date in [trade_date-365,trade_date]) |
| latest_dividend_ann_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_dividend_ann_date | 最近分红公告日 = asof(max(financial_dividend.ann_date <= trade_date)) |
| latest_dividend_end_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_dividend_end_date | 最近分红所属报告期 = latest financial_dividend.end_date |
| latest_dividend_ex_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_dividend_ex_date | 最近除权除息日 = latest financial_dividend.ex_date |
| latest_dividend_record_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_dividend_record_date | 最近股权登记日 = latest financial_dividend.record_date |
| latest_dividend_pay_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_dividend_pay_date | 最近派息日 = latest financial_dividend.pay_date |
| latest_dividend_proc | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | latest_dividend_proc | 最近分红实施进度 = financial_dividend.div_proc |
| cash_dividend_per_share_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | cash_dividend_per_share_latest | 最近每股现金分红 = financial_dividend.cash_div |
| cash_dividend_after_tax_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | cash_dividend_after_tax_latest | 最近税后每股现金分红 = financial_dividend.cash_div_tax |
| bonus_share_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | bonus_share_ratio_latest | 最近送股比例 = financial_dividend.stk_bo_rate |
| transfer_share_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | transfer_share_ratio_latest | 最近转增比例 = financial_dividend.stk_co_rate |
| stock_dividend_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | stock_dividend_ratio_latest | 最近送转合计比例 = coalesce(stk_bo_rate,0)+coalesce(stk_co_rate,0) |
| cash_dividend_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | cash_dividend_ttm | 近一年每股现金分红合计 = sum(cash_div) over event_date 365d |
| cash_dividend_after_tax_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | cash_dividend_after_tax_ttm | 近一年税后每股现金分红合计 = sum(cash_div_tax) over event_date 365d |
| stock_dividend_ratio_ttm | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | stock_dividend_ratio_ttm | 近一年送转比例合计 = sum(stk_bo_rate+stk_co_rate) over event_date 365d |
| dividend_event_count_365d | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | dividend_event_count_365d | 近一年分红事件数 = count(dividend events in 365d) |
| days_since_dividend_ann | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_dividend_ann | 距最近分红公告天数 = trade_date-latest_dividend_ann_date |
| days_since_ex_dividend | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_ex_dividend | 距最近除权除息天数 = trade_date-latest_dividend_ex_date |
| has_dividend_announced_not_executed | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_dividend_announced_not_executed | 是否有已公告未除权分红 = exists(ann_date<=trade_date<ex_date) |
| next_announced_ex_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | next_announced_ex_date | 下一次已公告除权除息日 = min(ex_date where ann_date<=trade_date<ex_date) |
| next_announced_cash_dividend | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | next_announced_cash_dividend | 下一次已公告每股现金分红 = cash_div at next_announced_ex_date |
| has_forecast_asof | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_forecast_asof | 是否已有业绩预告 = exists(financial_forecast.ann_date <= trade_date) |
| latest_forecast_ann_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_forecast_ann_date | 最近预告公告日 = latest financial_forecast.ann_date |
| latest_forecast_end_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_forecast_end_date | 最近预告报告期 = latest financial_forecast.end_date |
| forecast_type_latest | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | forecast_type_latest | 最近预告类型 = financial_forecast.forecast_type |
| forecast_type_code_latest | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | forecast_type_code_latest | 最近预告类型编码 = enum(forecast_type_latest) |
| forecast_p_change_min_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | forecast_p_change_min_latest | 预告净利变动下限 = financial_forecast.p_change_min |
| forecast_p_change_max_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | forecast_p_change_max_latest | 预告净利变动上限 = financial_forecast.p_change_max |
| forecast_p_change_mid_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | forecast_p_change_mid_latest | 预告净利变动中位 = (p_change_min+p_change_max)/2 |
| forecast_net_profit_min_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | forecast_net_profit_min_latest | 预告净利润下限 = financial_forecast.net_profit_min |
| forecast_net_profit_max_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | forecast_net_profit_max_latest | 预告净利润上限 = financial_forecast.net_profit_max |
| forecast_net_profit_mid_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | forecast_net_profit_mid_latest | 预告净利润中位 = (net_profit_min+net_profit_max)/2 |
| forecast_range_width_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | forecast_range_width_latest | 预告净利润区间宽度 = net_profit_max-net_profit_min |
| forecast_change_range_width_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | forecast_change_range_width_latest | 预告变动幅度区间宽度 = p_change_max-p_change_min |
| days_since_forecast_ann | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_forecast_ann | 距最近预告公告天数 = trade_date-latest_forecast_ann_date |
| has_express_asof | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | has_express_asof | 是否已有业绩快报 = exists(financial_express.ann_date <= trade_date) |
| latest_express_ann_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_express_ann_date | 最近快报公告日 = latest financial_express.ann_date |
| latest_express_end_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_express_end_date | 最近快报报告期 = latest financial_express.end_date |
| express_revenue_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | express_revenue_latest | 最近快报营业收入 = financial_express.revenue |
| express_operating_profit_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | express_operating_profit_latest | 最近快报营业利润 = financial_express.operating_profit |
| express_total_profit_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | express_total_profit_latest | 最近快报利润总额 = financial_express.total_profit |
| express_net_profit_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | express_net_profit_latest | 最近快报净利润 = financial_express.net_profit |
| express_total_assets_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | express_total_assets_latest | 最近快报总资产 = financial_express.total_assets |
| express_equity_attr_parent_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | express_equity_attr_parent_latest | 最近快报归母权益 = financial_express.equity_attr_parent |
| express_diluted_eps_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | express_diluted_eps_latest | 最近快报摊薄EPS = financial_express.diluted_eps |
| express_diluted_roe_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | express_diluted_roe_latest | 最近快报摊薄ROE = financial_express.diluted_roe |
| express_yoy_net_profit_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | express_yoy_net_profit_latest | 最近快报净利润同比 = financial_express.yoy_net_profit |
| days_since_express_ann | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_express_ann | 距最近快报公告天数 = trade_date-latest_express_ann_date |
| latest_audit_ann_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_audit_ann_date | 最近审计公告日 = latest financial_audit_opinion.ann_date |
| latest_audit_end_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_audit_end_date | 最近审计报告期 = latest financial_audit_opinion.end_date |
| audit_opinion_latest | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | audit_opinion_latest | 最近审计意见 = financial_audit_opinion.audit_result |
| audit_opinion_code_latest | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | audit_opinion_code_latest | 最近审计意见编码 = enum(audit_opinion_latest) |
| non_standard_audit_flag_latest | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | non_standard_audit_flag_latest | 最近是否非标审计意见 = audit_opinion_code_latest in (2,3,4,5,99) |
| audit_fees_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | audit_fees_latest | 最近审计费用 = financial_audit_opinion.audit_fees |
| audit_agency_latest | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | audit_agency_latest | 最近审计机构 = financial_audit_opinion.audit_agency |
| days_since_audit_ann | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_audit_ann | 距最近审计公告天数 = trade_date-latest_audit_ann_date |
| latest_mainbz_end_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_mainbz_end_date | 最近主营构成报告期 = asof(max(financial_main_business.end_date)) |
| mainbz_segment_count_latest | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | mainbz_segment_count_latest | 最近主营分部数量 = count(bz_item) by ts_code,end_date |
| mainbz_revenue_total_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_revenue_total_latest | 最近主营分部收入合计 = sum(bz_sales) |
| mainbz_profit_total_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_profit_total_latest | 最近主营分部利润合计 = sum(bz_profit) |
| mainbz_cost_total_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_cost_total_latest | 最近主营分部成本合计 = sum(bz_cost) |
| mainbz_top1_revenue_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_top1_revenue_ratio_latest | 第一大业务收入占比 = max(bz_sales)/sum(bz_sales) |
| mainbz_top3_revenue_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_top3_revenue_ratio_latest | 前三大业务收入占比 = sum(top3 bz_sales)/sum(bz_sales) |
| mainbz_top1_profit_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_top1_profit_ratio_latest | 第一大业务利润占比 = max(bz_profit)/sum(bz_profit) |
| mainbz_gross_margin_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_gross_margin_latest | 主营分部毛利率 = (sum(bz_sales)-sum(bz_cost))/sum(bz_sales) |
| days_since_mainbz_end_date | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_mainbz_end_date | 距主营构成报告期天数 = trade_date-latest_mainbz_end_date |
| latest_repurchase_ann_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_repurchase_ann_date | 最近回购公告日 = latest financial_repurchase.ann_date |
| latest_repurchase_proc | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | latest_repurchase_proc | 最近回购进度 = financial_repurchase.proc |
| latest_repurchase_proc_code | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | latest_repurchase_proc_code | 最近回购进度编码 = enum(latest_repurchase_proc) |
| latest_repurchase_volume | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | latest_repurchase_volume | 最近回购数量 = financial_repurchase.volume |
| latest_repurchase_amount | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | latest_repurchase_amount | 最近回购金额 = financial_repurchase.amount |
| latest_repurchase_high_limit | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | latest_repurchase_high_limit | 最近回购价格上限 = financial_repurchase.high_limit |
| latest_repurchase_low_limit | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | latest_repurchase_low_limit | 最近回购价格下限 = financial_repurchase.low_limit |
| repurchase_amount_365d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | repurchase_amount_365d | 近一年回购金额合计 = sum(amount) over 365d |
| repurchase_volume_365d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | repurchase_volume_365d | 近一年回购数量合计 = sum(volume) over 365d |
| repurchase_count_365d | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | repurchase_count_365d | 近一年回购事件数 = count(repurchase events) over 365d |
| days_since_repurchase_ann | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_repurchase_ann | 距最近回购公告天数 = trade_date-latest_repurchase_ann_date |
| latest_share_float_ann_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_share_float_ann_date | 最近解禁公告日 = latest financial_share_float.ann_date |
| latest_share_float_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_share_float_date | 最近解禁日期 = max(float_date <= trade_date) |
| latest_share_float_share | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | latest_share_float_share | 最近解禁股数 = financial_share_float.float_share |
| latest_share_float_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | latest_share_float_ratio | 最近解禁比例 = financial_share_float.float_ratio |
| share_float_event_count_365d | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | share_float_event_count_365d | 近一年解禁事件数 = count(float_date in 365d) |
| share_float_share_365d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | share_float_share_365d | 近一年解禁股数合计 = sum(float_share) over 365d |
| share_float_ratio_365d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | share_float_ratio_365d | 近一年解禁比例合计 = sum(float_ratio) over 365d |
| days_since_share_float | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_share_float | 距最近解禁天数 = trade_date-latest_share_float_date |
| next_share_float_date_30d | DATE | yes | local_derived | next_share_float_date_30d | 未来30日最近已公告解禁日 = min(float_date) with ann_date<=trade_date<float_date<=trade_date+30 |
| next_share_float_share_30d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | next_share_float_share_30d | 未来30日已公告解禁股数 = sum(float_share) with ann_date<=trade_date<float_date<=trade_date+30 |
| next_share_float_ratio_30d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | next_share_float_ratio_30d | 未来30日已公告解禁比例 = sum(float_ratio) with ann_date<=trade_date<float_date<=trade_date+30 |
| next_share_float_share_90d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | next_share_float_share_90d | 未来90日已公告解禁股数 = sum(float_share) with ann_date<=trade_date<float_date<=trade_date+90 |
| next_share_float_ratio_90d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | next_share_float_ratio_90d | 未来90日已公告解禁比例 = sum(float_ratio) with ann_date<=trade_date<float_date<=trade_date+90 |
| total_share_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_share_asof | 当日总股本 = stock_daily_basic.total_share |
| float_share_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | float_share_asof | 当日流通股本 = stock_daily_basic.float_share |
| free_share_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_share_asof | 当日自由流通股本 = stock_daily_basic.free_share |
| float_share_ratio_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | float_share_ratio_asof | 流通股本占总股本 = float_share_asof/total_share_asof |
| free_share_ratio_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_share_ratio_asof | 自由流通股本占总股本 = free_share_asof/total_share_asof |
| total_share_chg_20d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_share_chg_20d | 总股本20日变化 = total_share_asof-lag(total_share_asof,20 trading days) |
| float_share_chg_20d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | float_share_chg_20d | 流通股本20日变化 = float_share_asof-lag(float_share_asof,20 trading days) |
| free_share_chg_20d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_share_chg_20d | 自由流通股本20日变化 = free_share_asof-lag(free_share_asof,20 trading days) |
| cash_dividend_3y_sum | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | cash_dividend_3y_sum | 三年每股现金分红合计 = sum(cash_div) over 3y |
| cash_dividend_5y_sum | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | cash_dividend_5y_sum | 五年每股现金分红合计 = sum(cash_div) over 5y |
| dividend_year_count_3y | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | dividend_year_count_3y | 三年有分红年份数 = count(distinct year(ex_date)) over 3y |
| dividend_year_count_5y | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | dividend_year_count_5y | 五年有分红年份数 = count(distinct year(ex_date)) over 5y |
| dividend_interval_days_latest | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | dividend_interval_days_latest | 最近两次分红间隔 = latest_ex_date-previous_ex_date |
| cash_dividend_ttm_to_close | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | cash_dividend_ttm_to_close | 近一年现金分红/未复权收盘价 = cash_dividend_ttm/stock_daily.close |
| cash_dividend_ttm_to_total_mv | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | cash_dividend_ttm_to_total_mv | 近一年现金分红估算/总市值 = cash_dividend_ttm*total_share/total_mv |
| forecast_count_365d | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | forecast_count_365d | 近一年预告次数 = count(forecast ann_date in 365d) |
| forecast_revision_count_same_end_date | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | forecast_revision_count_same_end_date | 同一报告期预告修正次数 = count(distinct ann_date) by ts_code,end_date |
| forecast_latest_summary | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | forecast_latest_summary | 最近预告摘要 = financial_forecast.summary |
| forecast_latest_change_reason | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | forecast_latest_change_reason | 最近预告原因 = financial_forecast.change_reason |
| express_count_365d | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | express_count_365d | 近一年快报次数 = count(express ann_date in 365d) |
| express_latest_performance_summary | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | express_latest_performance_summary | 最近快报摘要 = financial_express.performance_summary |
| audit_fees_change_1y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | audit_fees_change_1y | 审计费用一年变化 = audit_fees_latest-lag_1y_audit_fees |
| audit_fees_change_rate_1y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | audit_fees_change_rate_1y | 审计费用一年变化率 = audit_fees_change_1y/lag_1y_audit_fees |
| audit_agency_changed_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | audit_agency_changed_flag | 审计机构是否变更 = audit_agency_latest != previous_audit_agency |
| non_standard_audit_count_5y | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | non_standard_audit_count_5y | 五年非标审计次数 = sum(non_standard_audit_flag) over 5y |
| mainbz_top1_item_latest | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | mainbz_top1_item_latest | 第一大业务名称 = arg_max(bz_item,bz_sales) |
| mainbz_top1_code_latest | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | mainbz_top1_code_latest | 第一大业务代码 = arg_max(bz_code,bz_sales) |
| mainbz_hhi_revenue_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_hhi_revenue_latest | 主营收入HHI = sum((bz_sales/sum_sales)^2) |
| mainbz_hhi_profit_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_hhi_profit_latest | 主营利润HHI = sum((bz_profit/sum_profit)^2) |
| mainbz_segment_count_change_1y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_segment_count_change_1y | 主营分部数一年变化 = current-lag_1y |
| mainbz_top1_revenue_ratio_change_1y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | mainbz_top1_revenue_ratio_change_1y | 第一大业务收入占比一年变化 = current-lag_1y |
| repurchase_amount_to_total_mv_365d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | repurchase_amount_to_total_mv_365d | 近一年回购金额/总市值 = repurchase_amount_365d/total_mv |
| repurchase_volume_to_total_share_365d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | repurchase_volume_to_total_share_365d | 近一年回购数量/总股本 = repurchase_volume_365d/total_share |
| repurchase_amount_3y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | repurchase_amount_3y | 三年回购金额合计 = sum(amount) over 3y |
| repurchase_count_3y | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | repurchase_count_3y | 三年回购事件数 = count(events) over 3y |
| next_share_float_share_180d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | next_share_float_share_180d | 未来180日已公告解禁股数 = sum(float_share) future 180d with ann_date<=trade_date |
| next_share_float_ratio_180d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | next_share_float_ratio_180d | 未来180日已公告解禁比例 = sum(float_ratio) future 180d with ann_date<=trade_date |
| share_float_share_3y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | share_float_share_3y | 过去三年解禁股数合计 = sum(float_share) over 3y |
| share_float_ratio_3y | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | share_float_ratio_3y | 过去三年解禁比例合计 = sum(float_ratio) over 3y |
| total_share_chg_60d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_share_chg_60d | 总股本60日变化 = total_share_asof-lag(total_share_asof,60) |
| total_share_chg_120d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_share_chg_120d | 总股本120日变化 = total_share_asof-lag(total_share_asof,120) |
| total_share_chg_250d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | total_share_chg_250d | 总股本250日变化 = total_share_asof-lag(total_share_asof,250) |
| float_share_chg_60d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | float_share_chg_60d | 流通股本60日变化 = float_share_asof-lag(float_share_asof,60) |
| float_share_chg_120d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | float_share_chg_120d | 流通股本120日变化 = float_share_asof-lag(float_share_asof,120) |
| float_share_chg_250d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | float_share_chg_250d | 流通股本250日变化 = float_share_asof-lag(float_share_asof,250) |
| free_share_chg_60d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_share_chg_60d | 自由流通股本60日变化 = free_share_asof-lag(free_share_asof,60) |
| free_share_chg_120d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_share_chg_120d | 自由流通股本120日变化 = free_share_asof-lag(free_share_asof,120) |
| free_share_chg_250d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_share_chg_250d | 自由流通股本250日变化 = free_share_asof-lag(free_share_asof,250) |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | no | local_derived | updated_at | 本地更新时间 = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP |

## corporate_action_event_timeline_v

Corporate action unified event timeline view

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, event_type, event_date, record_key`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| event_type | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | event_type | 事件类型 |
| event_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | event_date | 事件发生日 |
| effective_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | effective_date | 信息可得日 |
| end_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | end_date | 报告期 |
| record_key | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | record_key | 原始记录键 |
| event_value_1 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | event_value_1 | 事件数值1 |
| event_value_2 | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | event_value_2 | 事件数值2 |
| event_text | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | event_text | 事件文本 |
| source_table | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | source_table | 来源表 |

## derived_ownership_governance_full_v

Phase 3 ownership and governance full view

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| ownership_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | ownership_available_flag | 持有人治理数据可用标记 = 任一核心来源字段非空 |
| latest_ownership_event_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_ownership_event_date | 最近持有人治理事件日期 = max(event_date <= trade_date) |
| days_since_latest_ownership_event | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_latest_ownership_event | 距最近持有人治理事件天数 = trade_date-latest_ownership_event_date |
| ownership_event_count_365d | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | ownership_event_count_365d | 近一年持有人治理事件数 = count(event_date in 365d) |
| latest_pledge_end_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_pledge_end_date | 最新质押统计日期 = asof(max(financial_pledge_stat.end_date <= trade_date)) |
| pledge_count_asof | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | pledge_count_asof | 最新质押笔数 = financial_pledge_stat.pledge_count |
| pledge_unreleased_share_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_unreleased_share_asof | 最新未解押质押股数 = financial_pledge_stat.unrest_pledge |
| pledge_released_share_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_released_share_asof | 最新已解押质押股数 = financial_pledge_stat.rest_pledge |
| pledge_total_share_base_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_total_share_base_asof | 质押统计总股本 = financial_pledge_stat.total_share |
| pledge_ratio_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_ratio_asof | 最新质押比例 = financial_pledge_stat.pledge_ratio; source percent/rate口径 |
| pledge_ratio_chg_1report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_ratio_chg_1report | 质押比例较上一统计期变化 = current-previous pledge report |
| pledge_ratio_chg_4report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_ratio_chg_4report | 质押比例较四个统计期前变化 = current-lag4 pledge report |
| pledge_count_chg_1report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_count_chg_1report | 质押笔数较上一统计期变化 = current-previous pledge report |
| pledge_share_to_total_share_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_share_to_total_share_asof | 未解押质押股数/总股本 = pledge_unreleased_share_asof/stock_daily_basic.total_share |
| pledge_stat_staleness_days | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | pledge_stat_staleness_days | 质押统计滞后天数 = trade_date-latest_pledge_end_date |
| pledge_ratio_ge_10_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | pledge_ratio_ge_10_flag | 质押比例不低于10事实标记 = pledge_ratio_asof >= 10 |
| pledge_ratio_ge_30_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | pledge_ratio_ge_30_flag | 质押比例不低于30事实标记 = pledge_ratio_asof >= 30 |
| pledge_ratio_ge_50_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | pledge_ratio_ge_50_flag | 质押比例不低于50事实标记 = pledge_ratio_asof >= 50 |
| pledge_data_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | pledge_data_available_flag | 质押统计可用标记 = latest_pledge_end_date is not null |
| latest_holder_ann_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_holder_ann_date | 最新股东户数公告日 = asof(max(financial_holder_number.ann_date <= trade_date)) |
| latest_holder_end_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_holder_end_date | 最新股东户数报告期 = financial_holder_number.end_date |
| holder_num_asof | BIGINT | yes | local_derived | holder_num_asof | 最新股东户数 = financial_holder_number.holder_num |
| holder_num_chg_1report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_chg_1report | 股东户数较上一期变化 = current-previous holder report |
| holder_num_chg_rate_1report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_chg_rate_1report | 股东户数较上一期变化率 = holder_num_chg_1report/previous_holder_num |
| holder_num_chg_4report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_chg_4report | 股东户数较四期前变化 = current-lag4 holder report |
| holder_num_chg_rate_4report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_chg_rate_4report | 股东户数较四期前变化率 = holder_num_chg_4report/lag4_holder_num |
| shares_per_holder_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | shares_per_holder_asof | 户均持股数 = stock_daily_basic.total_share/holder_num_asof |
| free_shares_per_holder_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | free_shares_per_holder_asof | 户均自由流通股数 = stock_daily_basic.free_share/holder_num_asof |
| holder_num_to_total_share | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_to_total_share | 股东户数/总股本 = holder_num_asof/stock_daily_basic.total_share |
| holder_num_to_free_share | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_to_free_share | 股东户数/自由流通股本 = holder_num_asof/stock_daily_basic.free_share |
| holder_num_staleness_days | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | holder_num_staleness_days | 股东户数数据滞后天数 = trade_date-latest_holder_ann_date |
| holder_data_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | holder_data_available_flag | 股东户数可用标记 = latest_holder_ann_date is not null |
| latest_top10_holder_ann_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_top10_holder_ann_date | 最新十大股东公告日 = asof(max(ann_date <= trade_date)) |
| latest_top10_holder_end_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_top10_holder_end_date | 最新十大股东报告期 = financial_top10_holders.end_date |
| top10_holder_count_latest | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top10_holder_count_latest | 十大股东明细数 = count(holder_name) |
| top1_holder_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top1_holder_ratio_latest | 第一大股东持股比例 = max(hold_ratio) |
| top3_holder_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top3_holder_ratio_latest | 前三大股东持股比例 = sum(top3 hold_ratio) |
| top5_holder_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top5_holder_ratio_latest | 前五大股东持股比例 = sum(top5 hold_ratio) |
| top10_holder_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_holder_ratio_latest | 十大股东持股比例 = sum(hold_ratio) |
| top10_holder_hhi_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_holder_hhi_latest | 十大股东持股HHI = sum((hold_ratio/100)^2) |
| top10_holder_ratio_chg_1report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_holder_ratio_chg_1report | 十大股东比例较上一期变化 = current-previous |
| top1_holder_ratio_chg_1report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top1_holder_ratio_chg_1report | 第一大股东比例较上一期变化 = current-previous |
| top10_holder_staleness_days | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top10_holder_staleness_days | 十大股东数据滞后天数 = trade_date-latest_top10_holder_ann_date |
| latest_top10_float_ann_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_top10_float_ann_date | 最新十大流通股东公告日 = asof(max(ann_date <= trade_date)) |
| latest_top10_float_end_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_top10_float_end_date | 最新十大流通股东报告期 = financial_top10_float_holders.end_date |
| top10_float_holder_count_latest | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top10_float_holder_count_latest | 十大流通股东明细数 = count(holder_name) |
| top1_float_holder_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top1_float_holder_ratio_latest | 第一大流通股东持股比例 = max(hold_float_ratio) |
| top3_float_holder_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top3_float_holder_ratio_latest | 前三大流通股东持股比例 = sum(top3 hold_float_ratio) |
| top5_float_holder_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top5_float_holder_ratio_latest | 前五大流通股东持股比例 = sum(top5 hold_float_ratio) |
| top10_float_holder_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_float_holder_ratio_latest | 十大流通股东持股比例 = sum(hold_float_ratio) |
| top10_float_holder_hhi_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_float_holder_hhi_latest | 十大流通股东HHI = sum((hold_float_ratio/100)^2) |
| top10_float_holder_ratio_chg_1report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_float_holder_ratio_chg_1report | 十大流通股东比例较上一期变化 = current-previous |
| top1_float_holder_ratio_chg_1report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top1_float_holder_ratio_chg_1report | 第一大流通股东比例较上一期变化 = current-previous |
| top10_float_staleness_days | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top10_float_staleness_days | 十大流通股东数据滞后天数 = trade_date-latest_top10_float_ann_date |
| ownership_concentration_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ownership_concentration_ratio_latest | 综合股权集中度 = coalesce(top10_holder_ratio_latest, top10_float_holder_ratio_latest) |
| ownership_concentration_chg_1report | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | ownership_concentration_chg_1report | 综合集中度较上一期变化 = current-previous |
| float_concentration_premium_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | float_concentration_premium_latest | 流通集中度相对总股东集中度差 = top10_float_holder_ratio_latest-top10_holder_ratio_latest |
| pledge_to_concentration_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_to_concentration_ratio | 质押比例/集中度 = pledge_ratio_asof/top10_holder_ratio_latest |

| pledge_count_chg_60d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_count_chg_60d | 质押笔数60日变化 = pledge_count_asof-lag(pledge_count_asof,60) |

| pledge_count_chg_250d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_count_chg_250d | 质押笔数250日变化 = pledge_count_asof-lag(pledge_count_asof,250) |
| holder_num_chg_20d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_chg_20d | 股东户数20日变化 = holder_num_asof-lag(holder_num_asof,20) |
| holder_num_chg_60d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_chg_60d | 股东户数60日变化 = holder_num_asof-lag(holder_num_asof,60) |

| holder_num_chg_250d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_chg_250d | 股东户数250日变化 = holder_num_asof-lag(holder_num_asof,250) |
| holder_num_chg_rate_20d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_chg_rate_20d | 股东户数20日变化率 = chg/lag |
| holder_num_chg_rate_60d | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | holder_num_chg_rate_60d | 股东户数60日变化率 = chg/lag |

| top1_holder_name_latest | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | top1_holder_name_latest | 第一大股东名称 = arg_max(holder_name,hold_ratio) |
| top1_holder_type_latest | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | top1_holder_type_latest | 第一大股东类型 = arg_max(holder_type,hold_ratio) |
| top10_institution_holder_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_institution_holder_ratio_latest | 十大股东中机构持股比例 = sum(hold_ratio where holder_type normalized institution) |
| top10_individual_holder_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_individual_holder_ratio_latest | 十大股东中个人持股比例 = sum(hold_ratio where holder_type normalized individual) |
| top10_holder_change_sum_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_holder_change_sum_latest | 十大股东持股变动合计 = sum(hold_change) |
| top10_holder_positive_change_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top10_holder_positive_change_count | 十大股东增持人数 = count(hold_change>0) |
| top10_holder_negative_change_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top10_holder_negative_change_count | 十大股东减持人数 = count(hold_change<0) |
| top10_holder_name_churn_1report | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top10_holder_name_churn_1report | 十大股东名单较上一报告期是否变动 = same set 0 else 1 |
| top1_float_holder_name_latest | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | top1_float_holder_name_latest | 第一大流通股东名称 = arg_max(holder_name,hold_float_ratio) |
| top1_float_holder_type_latest | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | top1_float_holder_type_latest | 第一大流通股东类型 = arg_max(holder_type,hold_float_ratio) |
| top10_float_institution_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_float_institution_ratio_latest | 十大流通股东机构持股比例 = sum(hold_float_ratio where institution) |
| top10_float_individual_ratio_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_float_individual_ratio_latest | 十大流通股东个人持股比例 = sum(hold_float_ratio where individual) |
| top10_float_holder_change_sum_latest | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | top10_float_holder_change_sum_latest | 十大流通股东持股变动合计 = sum(hold_change) |
| top10_float_holder_positive_change_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top10_float_holder_positive_change_count | 十大流通股东增持人数 = count(hold_change>0) |
| top10_float_holder_negative_change_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top10_float_holder_negative_change_count | 十大流通股东减持人数 = count(hold_change<0) |
| top10_float_holder_name_churn_1report | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | top10_float_holder_name_churn_1report | 十大流通股东名单较上一报告期是否变动 = same set 0 else 1 |
| pledge_detail_active_count_asof | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | pledge_detail_active_count_asof | asof有效质押明细数 = active pledge detail count |
| pledge_detail_active_amount_asof | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | pledge_detail_active_amount_asof | asof有效质押明细股数 = sum(active pledge_amount) |
| pledge_release_count_365d | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | pledge_release_count_365d | 近一年解押事件数 = count(release events in 365d) |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMP | no | local_derived | updated_at | 本地更新时间 = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP |
