## derived_composite_state_full_v

Phase 3 composite factual state full explanatory view

- Phase: `P3`
- Primary key: `ts_code, trade_date`

| field | type | nullable | source_api | source_field | description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ts_code | VARCHAR | no | local_derived | ts_code | 股票代码 |
| trade_date | DATE | no | local_derived | trade_date | 交易日期 |
| composite_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | composite_available_flag | 综合状态可用标记 = 任一核心上游模块可用 |
| module_available_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | module_available_count | 上游模块可用数量 = core module available flags true count |
| module_available_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | module_available_ratio | 上游模块可用率 = module_available_count / module_count |
| missing_module_names | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | missing_module_names | 缺失模块名称列表 = missing core modules joined by semicolon |
| state_condition_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | state_condition_count | 核心状态条件满足数量 = true condition count |
| state_condition_available_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | state_condition_available_count | 核心状态条件可判断数量 = non-null condition count |
| state_condition_available_ratio | DOUBLE | yes | local_derived | state_condition_available_ratio | 核心状态条件可判断率 = available condition count / total condition count |
| latest_low_freq_event_date | DATE | yes | local_derived | latest_low_freq_event_date | 最近低频事件日期 = greatest(financial/corporate/ownership event dates) |
| days_since_latest_low_freq_event | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | days_since_latest_low_freq_event | 距最近低频事件天数 = trade_date - latest_low_freq_event_date |
| is_listed_asof | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | is_listed_asof | 当日是否上市 = derived_daily_spine.is_listed_asof |
| list_status_asof | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | list_status_asof | 当日上市状态 = derived_daily_spine.list_status_asof |
| market_board_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | market_board_state | 市场板块状态 = exchange + ':' + market |
| list_age_bucket | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | list_age_bucket | 上市年限分层 = <1y/1-3y/3-5y/5-10y/ge10y/unknown |
| tradable_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | tradable_state | 交易可达状态 = derived_trading_constraint.tradable_state |
| price_valid_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | price_valid_state | 价格有效状态 = valid_price/trading_no_price/no_price/invalid_price |
| limit_lock_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | limit_lock_state | 涨跌停锁定状态 = none/limit_up/limit_down/one_price_limit/unknown |
| recent_suspend_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | recent_suspend_state | 近期停牌状态 = none/recent/mild/frequent/unknown |
| price_above_ma20_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | price_above_ma20_flag | 收盘价高于20日均线 = close_hfq > ma_20_hfq |
| price_above_ma60_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | price_above_ma60_flag | 收盘价高于60日均线 = close_hfq > ma_60_hfq |
| ma20_above_ma60_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | ma20_above_ma60_flag | 20日均线高于60日均线 = ma_20_hfq > ma_60_hfq |
| ma60_above_ma120_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | ma60_above_ma120_flag | 60日均线高于120日均线 = ma_60_hfq > ma_120_hfq |
| ma_alignment_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | ma_alignment_state | 均线排列状态 = bull/partial_bull/mixed/partial_bear/bear/unknown |
| ret_20_positive_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | ret_20_positive_flag | 20日收益为正 = ret_20_hfq > 0 |
| ret_60_positive_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | ret_60_positive_flag | 60日收益为正 = ret_60_hfq > 0 |
| ret_250_positive_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | ret_250_positive_flag | 250日收益为正 = ret_250_hfq > 0 |
| momentum_spread_positive_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | momentum_spread_positive_flag | 中期动量差为正 = momentum_60_20_hfq > 0 |
| trend_condition_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | trend_condition_count | 趋势条件满足数 = trend flags true count |
| trend_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | trend_state | 趋势枚举状态 = bull/partial_bull/mixed/partial_bear/bear/unknown |
| liquidity_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | liquidity_available_flag | 流动性状态可判断 = amount/turnover/amihud fields available |
| amount_activity_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | amount_activity_state | 成交额活跃度状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from amount_ma_20_pct_all_desc |
| turnover_activity_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | turnover_activity_state | 换手活跃度状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from turnover_rate_ma_20_pct_all_desc |
| liquidity_cost_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | liquidity_cost_state | 流动性成本状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from amihud_20_pct_all_desc |
| volatility_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | volatility_state | 波动状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from hv_60_pct_all_desc |
| drawdown_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | drawdown_state | 回撤状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from max_drawdown_60_hfq_pct_all_desc |
| liquidity_condition_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | liquidity_condition_count | 流动性条件满足数 = liquidity flags true count |
| risk_condition_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | risk_condition_count | 风险状态条件数 = risk flags true count |
| size_bucket_all | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | size_bucket_all | 全市场规模分层 = low/mid/high/unknown from log_total_mv_pct_all_desc |
| size_bucket_sw_l2 | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | size_bucket_sw_l2 | 申万二级内规模分层 = low/mid/high/unknown from log_total_mv_pct_sw_l2_desc |
| pe_valid_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | pe_valid_flag | PE可解释标记 = derived_valuation_size.pe_ttm_valid_flag |
| pb_valid_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | pb_valid_flag | PB可解释标记 = derived_valuation_size.pb_valid_flag |
| valuation_percentile_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | valuation_percentile_state | 历史估值位置状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from pe/pb/ps historical percentile |
| value_exposure_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | value_exposure_state | 价值暴露状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from value_exposure_z |
| size_exposure_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | size_exposure_state | 规模暴露状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from size_exposure_z |
| valuation_condition_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | valuation_condition_count | 估值状态条件数 = valuation flags true count |
| financial_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | financial_available_flag | 财务状态可用标记 = latest_report_end_date is not null |
| financial_statement_complete_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | financial_statement_complete_flag | 当前报告期三表及指标完整 = has_complete_statement_set_asof |
| financial_staleness_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | financial_staleness_state | 财务数据滞后状态 = fresh/normal/stale/unknown by report age |
| profitability_positive_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | profitability_positive_flag | 盈利能力为正 = roe_asof > 0 or roa_asof > 0 |
| cashflow_profit_match_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | cashflow_profit_match_flag | 经营现金流与利润同向 = ocf_to_profit_asof > 0 |
| leverage_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | leverage_state | 资产负债状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from debt_to_assets_asof_pct_all_desc |
| growth_revenue_positive_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | growth_revenue_positive_flag | 收入同比为正 = revenue_yoy_asof > 0 |
| growth_profit_positive_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | growth_profit_positive_flag | 净利润同比为正 = netprofit_yoy_asof > 0 |
| quality_exposure_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | quality_exposure_state | 财务质量暴露状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from quality_exposure_z |
| growth_exposure_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | growth_exposure_state | 成长暴露状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from growth_exposure_z |
| financial_condition_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | financial_condition_count | 财务条件满足数 = financial flags true count |
| capital_flow_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | capital_flow_available_flag | 资金流状态可用标记 = has_moneyflow or has_margin or has_north_holding |
| main_flow_20_positive_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | main_flow_20_positive_flag | 20日主力净流入为正 = main_flow_sum_20 > 0 |
| main_flow_persist_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | main_flow_persist_state | 主力净流入持续状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from main_flow_persist_ratio_20 |
| margin_balance_change_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | margin_balance_change_state | 融资余额变化状态 = decrease/flat/increase/unknown |
| north_holding_change_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | north_holding_change_state | 北向持股变化状态 = decrease/flat/increase/unknown |
| top_list_recent_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | top_list_recent_flag | 近期龙虎榜事件标记 = top_list_count_20 > 0 when available |
| flow_exposure_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | flow_exposure_state | 资金流暴露状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from flow_exposure_z |
| capital_flow_condition_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | capital_flow_condition_count | 资金流条件满足数 = capital flow flags true count |
| sector_context_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | sector_context_available_flag | 行业上下文可用标记 = sw_l1_code is not null |

| sw_l2_code | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | sw_l2_code | 申万二级行业代码 = derived_sector_concept_context.sw_l2_code |
| sector_relative_return_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | sector_relative_return_state | 行业内相对收益状态 = lag/mid/lead/unknown from stock_excess_sw_l2_20 |
| concept_membership_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_membership_state | 概念归属状态 = none/single/multiple/unknown |
| concept_heat_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | concept_heat_state | 概念热度状态 = low/mid/high/unknown from concept_hot_count_20 |
| index_membership_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | index_membership_state | 主要指数成员状态 = major/broad/none/unknown |
| market_context_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | market_context_state | 市场环境状态 = down/mixed/up/unknown from market_up_ratio |
| sector_market_condition_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | sector_market_condition_count | 板块市场条件数 = sector/market flags true count |
| corporate_action_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | corporate_action_available_flag | 公司行为状态可用标记 = derived_corporate_action.corp_action_available_flag |
| dividend_recent_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | dividend_recent_state | 近期分红状态 = none/recent/active/unknown |
| forecast_recent_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | forecast_recent_state | 业绩预告状态 = none/available/unknown |
| audit_opinion_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | audit_opinion_state | 审计意见状态 = standard/non_standard/unknown |
| repurchase_recent_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | repurchase_recent_flag | 近期回购事件标记 = repurchase_amount_365d > 0 |
| unlock_future_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | unlock_future_state | 未来解禁状态 = none/within30d/within90d/unknown for announced events |
| ownership_available_flag | BOOLEAN | yes | local_derived | ownership_available_flag | 持有人治理状态可用标记 = derived_ownership_governance.ownership_available_flag |
| pledge_ratio_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | pledge_ratio_state | 质押比例状态 = below10/ge10/ge30/ge50/unknown |
| holder_number_change_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | holder_number_change_state | 股东户数变化状态 = decrease/flat/increase/unknown |
| holder_concentration_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | holder_concentration_state | 股权集中度状态 = low/mid/high/unknown |
| event_condition_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | event_condition_count | 事件治理条件数 = event and ownership flags true count |
| exposure_available_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | exposure_available_count | 横截面暴露可用数量 = non-null exposure z count |
| value_quality_pair_state | VARCHAR | yes | local_derived | value_quality_pair_state | 价值与质量暴露共现状态 = value_state + '_' + quality_state |

| multi_domain_condition_count | INTEGER | yes | local_derived | multi_domain_condition_count | 多域条件满足数 = trend/liquidity/financial/flow/sector/event condition counts sum |
